series_metadata.series_description: Voter Verified Paper Audit Trail (VVPAT) official ballot to be used for recount purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election, then destroy provided no pending court action or court order (R.C. 3506.18) ; Paper: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election, then destroy provided no pending court action or court order (R.C. 3506.18), Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
